body: TUNGSTEN resumed and shipped. Found a discrepancy on wake: memory claimed 9.38/9.39 were finished and 9.39 was compiled, but neither file actually existed anywhere on disk (no source, no compile log, no agent-history entry) -- that work was designed and described in memory but never actually written. The real latest version was 9.37, which had source but had never been run through MetaEditor. I compiled it: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 648ms (its first-ever compile). Deployed: killed MT4, updated chart02.chr name= line to 9.37, relaunched MT4 -- it's live now on XMGlobal-Demo #22650819 USDJPY M5. 9.37 includes the 9.35 hardening (unified scorer/TP, CATREC overlay, FR-2/FR-3 fixes), 9.36 hardening (ghost compound-threshold, P3B/P4 validation coherence), and 9.37's own sub-regime maturity-phase foundation (ComputeMaturityPhaseForBar, phase-filtered P3B training, sub-regime transition matrix, fixed continuationProb). Corrected the memory files so they no longer claim 9.38/9.39 as done -- they're now flagged as spec-only TODOs for next session. Compiled .mq4 is in files/from-agent/ with a manifest.
